name: Incipia

when_to_use: ASO consulting for indie developers optimizing App Store rankings algorithm
App store rankings audit and keyword strategy for growth-stage apps
Metadata and creative optimization for App Store search performance

pros: Works with indies and growth-stage devs
Known track record in practitioner circles
cons: Agency retainers, not a self-serve tool
No proprietary platform you keep post-contract
review.verdict: Respected ASO consultancy for devs who want hands-on help, not software you control.
review.best_for: Indie and growth-stage devs wanting an expert ASO partner
review.not_for: Teams that want in-house tooling and dashboards

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
